chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Const. Petition No. D – 4888 of 2025 __________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) 1 For hearing of CMA No.1407/2026 2 For orders on office objection 3 For hearing of CMA No.20409/2025 4 For hearing of main case 25.02.2026 Malik Altaf Hussain, Advocate along with the Petitioner. Mr. Mamoon A.K. Whirwany, Advocate along with Respondent No.4 Hunain. M/s. Hakim Ali Shaikh, Addl. A.G. Sindh and Sagheer Ahmed Abbasi, AAG. ------------------------------------ After arguing the matter at some length, learned counsel for the petitioner submits that the petitioner would be satisfied if the instant petition is disposed of with permission to approach the Appellate Tribunal Local Council, Sindh at Karachi and that the delay in filing the appeal be condoned. Accordingly, the instant petition along with listed applications is disposed of, leaving the petitioner at liberty to approach the Appellate Tribunal, Local Council, Sindh at Karachi. In the event of such approach, the Tribunal shall entertain the matter on merits, and the bar of limitation shall not come in the way of the petitioner. JUDGE HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Azeem
